description:
Measure the CCD read noise and bias level from Palomar Large Format Camera (LFC) bias frames located in ~/AstroImages/ccd_characterization/. Using the difference between two bias frames, calculate the standard deviation and determine the read noise using the formula: read_noise = stddev_difference / sqrt(2). Additionally, determine the bias level from the mean pixel value of a single bias frame. Save the results to ~/AstroImages/measurements/ccd_read_noise.txt using the following format:

bias_level_adu = <value>
read_noise_adu = <value>
stddev_difference = <value>

metadata.data_source: Palomar 200-inch Hale Telescope, Large Format Camera (LFC)
